targets.boundary: Company-wide value chain (including supply chain and product lifecycle)
targets.notes: Company-wide absolute reduction target across Scopes 1, 2, and 3 toward 2030 plan.
targets.title: Reduce absolute GHG emissions 75% by 2030 from 2015 baseline (Scopes 1–3)

targets.boundary: Company-wide value chain (including supply chain and product lifecycle)
targets.notes: Net-zero claim by 2030 with residual emissions to be neutralized via carbon removals.
targets.title: Carbon neutral across entire value chain by 2030 (Scopes 1–3)
